name: Maple Rice Crisp Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 and 1/2 cups Presweetened rice crisp cereal
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease cookie sheets.
Combine flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon in a bowl; sift together.
In another bowl, mix milk, egg, and maple flavoring.
Cream shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
Add the dry ingredients and liquids alternately, one at a time, to the creamed mixture. Stir only until the dry ingredients are moistened.
Fold in 1 cup of rice crisp cereal and chopped nuts.
Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto prepared pans.
Bake for about 15 minutes. Remove from pans; cool.
